calendar.matters:
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR CHANGE OF NAME
Off Calendar May-31-2012 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for OSC hearing for Change of Name of a Minor.
Dept. 514, Judge: Donald J. Sullivan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288

Petitioner Merceliza P. Pike present in pro per as guardian ad litem for the minor Marc Penez Andrades, placed under oath and examined.
Proof of Publication is in the file.
Petitioner's ex parte request for dispensing notice to the Minor's father Rodlfo William Andrades was granted in open court.
No objections to the proposed change of name were made at the hearing.
It appears to the satisfaction of the Court that all the allegations in the petition are true, correct and sufficient, and that the petition should be granted.

The Court grants the petition for Change of Name of the Minor to Marc P. Pike
Decree Changing Name was submitted to and signed by the Court.
